Aman jong Delilah henga asei: in, “Manchah khah lou lai hel khao thah jengin hakanin eikan chah jengule, katha lhasamin tin, midang bep bep kahi ding ahi,” atipeh kit’e.

Hijeh chun Delilah chun khaothah jeng alan Samson chu akan chah kheh kit’in, chujouvin ajah a, “Vo Samson, Philistine miten nadelvuh tauve;” tin agahsap khum kit’e. Angah a pang mi ho chu indan sungnunga changpang jing ahiuve. Ahinla Samsonin abanjang te nia akikanna khao jang jouse chu patjang kitum tan bangin atum tan kit tan ahi.

Chuphat’in Delilah chun Samson jah a aseiyin, “Ven tu chan geiyin jong neidai chavai nalaiyin najou bou neiseipeh nalaiye; inakilo mong hen lang hileh nakisom kon jou dingba ham? neiseipeh tei teiyin ong,” tin ajol kittan ahi. Hichun Samson in jong amanu jah a chun “Nangman kalujang sam ba sagi hi pheh khumin lang, alop lop’in veiyin heovin kilchah kheh le chun katha hung lhasamin tin, midang bep bep kahi ding ahitai,” atipeh kit’in ahi.

Hijeh chun Samson aihmut lan kah chan Delilah jong chun alujangsam ba sagi chu alan alop lop’in aveiyin, chuin abonchan heovin akil det soh keiyin, ajah a, “Vo Samson, Philistine miten nadelvuh tauve,” ati kitleh, Samson ahung khah phat’in aheo jang jong asam lom jong aban bodoh soh kit tai.

Chutah chun Delilah jong chun ajah a aseiyin, “Nalungthim bon heipe lou, iti dana nangin ‘kadeiye’ nati ham? Hitobang hin thumvei jen neijou lhep’in hitobang natha hat nasatah hi hoiya um ham, ti neiseidoh peh tapoi,” ati.
Hitobang tah a Delilah chun hangeh a angeh a, niseh le asei seijenga, Samson chu ajol jol jeng phat’in ama jong thina khop helin alung gimbehseh jeng tan ahi.

Hijeh chun Samsonin jong Delilah chu alungthim jouse aseidoh peh soh helin ajah a “Kei hi kanu sunga kaum laiya pat’a Pathen dia kipedoh Nazir khat kahung hin, hijeh a chu kalu chunga samchem kilam khaloulai hel ahi. Ijem tin kasam hi kivou chai deng taleh kathahat hin eida lhan tin, chutengle katha hung lhasama, mi dang bep bep kahi ding ahitai,” atidoh tai.

Samson chun alungthim aboncha ajah a aseidohpeh mong mong phat chun Delilah chun kichentah a amudoh phat’in, mi asol in Philistine milen milalte agakousah-in hitin aseiye, “Hungkon tou loiyun, ajeh chu Samson in alungthim abonchan eiseipeh soh heltai,” agatisah-e. Hijeh chun Philistine milen milal te Delilah henga ahung kitol touvun, akhut’uva dangka ahinchoi uvin ahi.

Chuin Delilah chun Samson chu apheichunga alhim ihmut phat’in pasal khat akou lut’in Samson sam lom sagia kipheh chu alujanga konin achelhah sah tai. Hiti hin Delilah-in Samson kichepnan aneiyin ahileh athahat chun ada lhatai.

Chutah chun Delilah-in jong “Vo Samson, Philistine miten nadelvuh tauve!” tia ahoh khah a ahileh, Samson jong aihmut ahung khahlon, “Masanga bang bangin kitomdoh ing ting kacham chamin kitoldoh tah tange,” ati nalaiye. Pakaiyin ana dalhah lam akihetdoh loulai ahiye.
Chuphat’in Philistine ten Samson chu aman’uvin amit chang teni alah dohpeh un, Gaza khopia ahinkaisuh-uvin, Sumeng guijin akanchah-un asomkon tauve; Samson songkul sunga songhei goiyin apangtai.
Ahin alujang sam chu akivo tol jouvin ahung khang khang kit tan ahi.

Philistine te milen milal te sese chu a pathen lim semthu dragon henga kilhaina loupi tah a kipa thanop bol din ahung kikhomsoh keitauve; ijeh-inem itile amahon aseiyun, “I-pathen lim semthu uhin imelmah pao Samson hi ikhut’a eipehdoh-u ahitai,” atiuvin ahi.

Hiti chun mipin jong Samson chu amu phat’uvin akipah lheh jenguvin apathen avahchoi choi jengui; ajeh chu ama on jong aseiyun, “Eiho pathen pan igamsungu bahgampa eiho mi tamtah that gampa akhut’uva eipedoh tauve,” atisoh keiyun ahi.

Chujongle alungthimu athanop behseh phat’in amahon aseiyun, “Samson chu gakoudoh-uvin, kichepnan neiyu hite,” atiuve. Hijeh chun songkul sunga konin Samson chu agakoudoh-uvin, a-angsunguva Samson chu golnop bola kichepnan anei tauve. Chujongle Samson chu inkhompi ni kikah a adinsah-uvin ahi.
Hichun Samsonin jong akhut’a kaipa chapangpa jah a chun “Inpi kidouna khompi teni chu neituh sah temin, kingainan neiyinge,” ati.

Hichepet’a hi insunga mihem numei pasal dimset’a um ahiuve; Philistine te milen milal jouse jong umkim kei ahiuvin inchung lama jong numei pasal sangthum tobang touvuva, Samson kichepna golnop’a akibol chua vet cheh-u ahiye.

Chutah chun Samson jong Pakai henga ataovin aseitai, “O Pakai, Yahweh, nahenga kahung taove, neihin geldoh tei teiyin tha neipen, khatvei jeng cha hijongleh! O Pathen Philistine te chunga hin kamit chang teni lang khat phu beh neilah sah tei teiyin,” ati.

Samson chun akikah a adinsah nau, ajet aveiya khompi teni inpi kidouna teni chu amaikhan, akhompi tenia chun akingai tai, ajetlam khut’in lang khat khompi asonin, aveilam khut’in lang khat khompi ma asonin ahi.

Chujongle Samson chun aseiyin, “Philistine te hitoh thi tha tange,” ati. Hiti chun athahat’in ajochanin asontan ahileh ainpi ahung achimin, milen milal jouse adelphan, insunga umjouse jong adelchap dentai. Hichea thi mong mong mihem jat chu Samson in ahinlaiya atha jat sangin atamjoi.

Chujouvin asopi pasal ho le ainkote abonchan ahunguvin Samson long ahung lauvin, ahinpotou peh-uvin, Zorah le Esh’ta-ol kikah a apa Mono’ah lhankhuh ma ma a avui tauvin ahi. Samson chu kum somni sungin Israel thutanin anapange.
Ephraim thinglhang gamsunga chun pasal amin Micah kiti khat ana umin ahi.

Micah hin anujah a aseiyin, “Nakoma kona kila mang dangka goi sang khat le ja khat, nangman nahan lo loa, kajah ajong naseisa chu vetan, adangka chu keikoma aumnai, ken kalah ahibouve,” ati. Hichun anun jong,” Vo kanao, Pakaiyin phatthei nabohjo hen,” ati.

Amanjong dangka goi sang khat le ja khat chu anu apekittai; chuin anun jong aseiyin, “Keiman hiche dangka hi milim kijempolle milimdoi kilhajol semna dinga kakhut tah a kachapa dinga kathenso ahitai. Hijeh a chu tua hi nangma kanungpeh ding nahi,” ati.

Hijeh chun aman adangka chu anu apeh phat’in, anun jong dangka ja ni alan, dangka khengpa agapen, aman jong dangka chu milim kijempol milim kilhajol doilimin asempeh-in, hiche milim doi chu Micah insunga akikoitan ahi.
Micah kiti mipa hin doiphung khat aneiyin, thempu von ompho le Teraphim jong akisemin, achapa te lah a khat jong chu thempun anapansah-in ahi.
Hiche lai hin Israel lah a leng ana um hih laiyin, mihemin ama ama mitvet a adih ahisah cheh aboltai.
Hiche pet chun Juda gamsung Bethlehem khoa Judah insunga kon Levi mi gollhang khat anaumin, agollhangpa chu chukoma agakholjin ahi.

Hichepachu hoikom hijongle mun akimu muna a chengden din Judah gamsung Bethlehem khopia konin akipat doh-in achetan ahi; hitia hi ahung kholjinpa pa a ahileh Ephraim thinglhang gamsunga Micah kitipa ina ahung’ lhungtai.
Ahungphat’in Micah chun ajah a, “Hoiya kona hung nahim?” tin anadonge. Hichun aman jong ajah a, “Keima Judah gamsung Bethlehem khoa cheng Levi mi kahin, chen mun kihol’a hung kholjinle kahi,” ati.

Chuphat’in Micah chun ajah a aseiyin, “Keikoma cheng ing lang, kapan jong pangin, kathempun jong neipanpeh tan, keiman kum khat sungin dangka somkhat napeng ting, thempu von kakhuipeh ding, naneh jong khang nange,” ati.
Chuin Levi mipa jong chu Micah toh chen khom ding anomtan, gollhangpa chu ama din achapa to bang khat ‘in aumtai.
Chujongle Micah chun Levi pa chu thempun apansah-in hiti hin gollhangpa chu ama thempun apangin, Micah insunga ahung cheng den tai.
Chuin Micah chun aseiyin “Levi mi khat thempua kanei ahitan, tua vang kaphattheiya kahaodoh ding ahitai,” atin ahi.

Hichelai chun Israelte lah a leng anaumpoi. Ahichelai ma hin Dan chate phung chun chenna gam gouva anei diu khat akihol’uvin ahi, ijeh-inem itileh hichan geiya hi Israel phung chujat goulo ding gam akihop vanguva Dan phung hi chang loulai ahiuve.

Hijeh chun Dan chaten jong aphung pumpiuva mijat thalhengin akiti thei dom cheh pasal nga Zorah khoa le Esh’taol khoa pat, agamsung gave lhia gakholtoh din asoldoh tauve; amisolho jah-a aseiyun, “Cheuvin lang agam khu gakholtoh tauvin,” atiuve. Hijeh chun amaho jong Ephraim thinglhang gamsung Micah kitipa ina chun ahung lhunguvin, ajan gehtauve.

Gamvea hung ho hi Micah ina ajan ge pet’uvin, Levi gollhang pa chu a-oson ahedoh-uvin, hijeh chun anailut’un ajah a “Koipenin hikoma napui lut hiya hilaiya hi ipi nabol ham? Hikoma ipi natongpen nahim?” tin adongtauve.
Levi gollhangpan jong ajah-uva “Hitobang banga hi Micah hin eibol ahi. Aman kathaman eipeh a keima ama dia thempua pang kahi,” ati.
Hichun amahon jong Levipa chu ajol’uvin, “Nahenga kataovu ahi, lungset tah-in Pathen neidoh peh tauvin, kahung vaikon nau hi kalo lhin diu hinam ti kahetdoh nom’uvin, ahi,” atiuleh.
Thempu pa chun ajah-uva aseipeh-in, “Lungmongselin chetauvin. Nahung kholjin nau nalam lhah-u hi Pakaiyin ave lhi jing nai,” atipeh-e.

Gam ve mi nga ho chu ahung vaikondoh pai kit’uvin, La’ish khoa ahung tauve; akhoa miho amu vin, inchen phatah a achenuva, Sidon mite chen bang banga achenu, chamdela aumuva, kiphalam louhel le leset thil jouse lhasam louva aum theiyu, haotah a aum’uva chule Sidon miho to kihepha louhela akikangseuva koima cha toh ima kimangto louva aum u agamudoh tauve.
Chuin Zorah khoa leh Esh’taol khoa asopite henga ahungun, “Seithei ipi thu nahin poh uvem?” anatiuve.

Chuphat’in amahon jong aseipai jengun, “Kipat’uvin agam mite khu gasat jengu hite; ajeh chu agam chu kaga musoh keiyun, gampha tah ahi. Imacha khohsah louva naum um diu ham? kinomsot sot hih hel’un, agamsunga lut’a chenpha loi din gouvin.

Hunguvin lang hileu chun kiphatlamna neilou hela um agam mite khu nahung mudoh diu ahi. Agam jong alet’a len ahin, Pathenin nakhut uva napeh mongu ahitai; agamsunga khu leiset chunga thil kiti. tapou alhasam umlou ahijenge,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuphat’in Dan phunga mi pasal ja gup’in gal manchah akipat cheh-uvin Zorah kho le Esh’taol khoa konin akondoh tauve;

hiti chun ahung kontouvin Judah gamsunga Kiriathje’arim kiti laiya chun ngahmun asemtauve. Ngahmun semna anei jeh-uva hiche laimun hi tulaigeiya jong Mahaneh-dan kiti den den ahitai; ven, amun hi Kiriathje’arim nilhum lam ahi.
Hikoma kon chun akitol pai kit’uvin Ephraim thinglhang gamsung ahinphauvin, Micah kitipa ina ahung lhungtauve.

Hichun la’ish gamsung velhia mi nga ho chun asopiteu jah a chun aseiyun “Hiche in ho hi asunguva thempu ompho khat teraphim khat toh, milim kijempol le milim kilhajol kikoi ahi, ti nahet themu hinam? Hijeh chun ipi naboluva lom ham, phate chan gelpha-uvin,” atiuve.
Hijeh chun amaho jong lang khat’a chun akiheiyuvin, Micah ina cheng Levi gollhangpa ina chun ahunguvin, aumchan adam le adamlou thu adonguvin ahi.
Dan mite gal manchah choi mihem ja gup jen chu kelkot phunga ding soh kei ahiuvin,

hichun gam ve lhia gache masa pasal nga chu asung lhauvin, milim kijempol le thempu ompho chu toh teraphim le milim kilhajol chengse chu abonchan agapodoh-uvin, thempupa chu gal manchah choi mihem jagup chutoh kelkot phunga chun adinguvin ahi.
Mi nga chu Micah insunga alut’uva milim kijempol le thempu ompho teraphim le milim kilhajol ahinpohdoh phat’uvin thempupan ajah-uva, “Ipi bola nahiu hitam?” atileh;

amahon jong ajah a, “Umthimin nakhut chun nakam kisep’in lang, keiho toh kilhonin hungin lang mipa le thempun hung pangin. Mi khatseh insung thempua napan nang dia phajom, Israel insung phung khat dia thempua napan chu phajo am?” atiuvin ahi.
Hichun thempupa jong chu alungthim akipahjotai; thempu ompho chu akilah-in teraphim le milim kijempol jong chu akilah-in mipi lailunga chun apangin achetai.
Hiti hin akiheisoh keiyun acheuvin nunao chapangte chule thilkeose se chu amasanga atoluvin ahi.
Micah ina kon chun acheuvin agamla thimlheh jengtauvin, ahivangin Micah inkom dunga indang danga cheng miho chu akisamkhom loiyun, Dan chate chu adeluvin aphatauvin ahi.
Adel ho chun Dan chate chu ahoh uvin ahileh amaho jong ahung kiheiyun Micah jah a chun, “Ipi pentah-in nalung aphatmo sah a nangman mi loi hijatpi nahin puiya nahung kon jeng ham?” tin adongtauve.

Hichun Micah chun, “Nanghon kasemsa doilim pathen jouse nalah-uva, thempupa napui manguva, nache jengu leh, keima ipiba neikhenpeh diu ham? Hitobanga chon tauva itidana ipi pen tah-in nalung phatmosah ham?’ neiti nahlaiyu ham?” atitai.
Hichun Dan chaten ajah a aseiyun, “Keiho lah a hin opoh le hih-in alung hang hon nabo khumuvin tin, nang nahin na-inkote ahiuvin nathi lo diu ahi,” tin aphoh tang tauve.
Hiti hin Dan chate chun alamjot’u ajot pai paiyun, Micah jong chun amato kidou din athanei behseh bouvui, ti amudoh phat’in ahung kiheiyin ainlanga ahung kile kittai.

Micah milim semthu la akilah-un, a them pupa ahinpui mang uvin, Dan chate chu Laish khoa, kiphat lamna neilou hela cheng lungmong tah a um mite heng ahung lhunguvin, amite chu chemjamin asat chap hel’uvin, akhopi jong meiyin ahalvam tauve.

Sidona kona jong gamla tah ahijeh leh amaho jong midang to kihepha lou kiveto louhel ahijeh-uvin ahuhdoh diu khatcha jong aumtapoi; amun mong mong chu Beth-rehob phaiham gamsunga um ahi. Dan chaten akhopi akithah sah-uvin chen nan aneitauve.
Akhopi chu Israel chapa, apu luiyu Dan min aputsah-uvin, amin Dan asah tauve; amasa akhopi min vang chu La’ish anakiti ahibouve.

Chuin Dan chaten milim kijempol houdin akitundoh tauve; chujongle Mose chapa Gershom kitipa Jonathan le achapate chu Dan chate din thempun apangun, agamsung soh changa alhanglhah kahseuvin anapanguvin ahi.
Hiti chun Shiloh khoa Pathen houin akitun laisen Micah semdoh milim kijempol doilim chu akitun jing jenguvin ahi.
Chulaiya Israel lah a jong leng ana umlou pet chun Levi mi pasal khat hi Ephraim thinglhang gam mong langa akholjin len, ama hin Judah gam Bethlehem khoa konin numei thaikem ding khat anakipuisa ahi.
Athaikemnu hi ajipa chunga alungphamon, hijeh chun ajipa koma konin anungjamin, Judah gamsung Bethlehem khoa apa ina ajamlut’in hikoma chun lha li jen aga tham tai.

Chuphat’in ajipa jong akipatdoh-in ajinu nung ajuiyin, ahenga lungset khototah a gahoulima hin nungpui din agon achetai. Levi mipa hin asohpa akipuiyin sangan to khat toh apuiye. Ama chu ajinu pa ina ahunga ajinu pan amu doh phat’in kipah tah a lamto din ahungdoh-in ahi.
Anupa pa, anumeinu pan jong ama chu alhunsah-in, amajong ama henga nithum anichong tai; hiti hin amanin an ane lhonin lengpi twi adon lhonin, hikoma chun ajan geh geh lhon tan ahi.
Ni li lhinin amani matah-in athoudoh lhonin, chedin akigo lhontai. Ahinla numeinu pa chun atupa jah a aseiyin “An khou khatbeh nen lang, natha kidoa nahatdoh teng che nan nate,” ati.
Hijeh chun mite ni chun an anelhonin twi adon lhonin, chujongle numeinu pan jong ajah alhona aseiyin “Lungdamselin jan geh lhonin nalung thim nom umsah lhontan,” ati.
Levi pa chu ache dinga akipat doh tei tei vangin apu pan alho lho jengin, ajan ge kitna dingin ajol jol jengin agesah tai.

Ni nga lhinin chedoh tei tei din akigon jingpi tah-in akithoudoh tan ahi; hiche jong chun numeinu pan aseikit’in “Nisa kihei kah sen an nelhonin nalung thim kidosah lhonin lang kho ngai lhon tadin,” ati kit-e. Hijeh chun amanin jong an ane kit lhone.

Levipa le athai kemnu, chule asohpa chu ache dia akipatdohjeng phat’uvin, apupa numeinu pa chun ajah a aseikit’in “Ven nisa’n alhumna ding lam ajonin, nilhah ahipai ding ahitai, lungset tah-in jan khovah-in jan geh kit jeng tauvin. Vetan nisa chu alhumna kot ageideh deh tai; hikoma geh kit jengun lang, lungthim nomtah in umtan; jing jingkah tengle matah-in thouvun natin najinna diu lam jonin cheuvin lang inlam jon nauvin nate,” ati kit tan ahi.
Hichun Levipa chu ajan geh tapon akipatdoh-in achen agal lama kho Jebus kiti Jerusalem ahung lhungtai. Aman sangan kop khat touna tosa le athaikemnu chu ahin kipuiye.
Jebus kho ahung nai phat’in asohpan jong apupa jah a aseiyin, hiche Jebus mite khopi lam jonin kiheiyu hitin akhoa khun ga jan gehtau hite,” ati.
Apupan jong ajah a aseiyin, “Israel chate lah a mibon hilou hiche chidang namdang te khopi sunga khun kiheilut pou hitin, jan jong jan geh poute, Gilead kho geiyin chepai tauhite,” ati.
Hijeh chun aman jong asohpa jah a chun, “Gib’eah hihen lang Ramah kho hijongle khat pen pen khu jon lut’u hitin, jan geh taute,” ati.
Hiti hin amalam anouvin, achepai paiyun ahileh, Benjamin mite kho khat Gib’eah aphah phat’uvin nisan alhumkhum tauve.

Hijeh chun amaho akihei yun khosunga avah lut’uvin Gib’eah khoa chun geh din akigo tauve. Levipa chu achelut’in kholai lamsom khat tolhang lah a atoutai; ijeh-inem itileh mihem koiman jong aina lhunsah a jan gesah din agotapon ahi.

Hichun ven, pasal upa khat vaikon, louva konin nilhah-in ahung vailhunge; upapu jong chu Ephraim thinglhang gamsunga mi ma ma ahin, ama jong hi Gib’eah khoa khopem ahi; Gib’eah khoa mite chu Benjamin chate jeng ahiuve.
Upapu hi akhoda a avet leh kholai vengkim tollhang lah a kholjin mipa chu amudoh tai; hijeh chun upapun adongin, “Hoilam jon ding nahiya, hoiya kona hung nahim?” atileh;

Levipa jong chun upapu jah a chun, “Keiho Ephraim thinglhang gamkalpeh Judah gamsung Bethlehem khoa hung kipan kahiuvin hikoma kona chu hung kahiuve. Judah gam Bethlehem khoa gache kahin, tua ka-in lam jon kahiye, koimachan aina lhunsah din eigon eipuipoi.
Keihon sangan teni neh ding changpolle aneh achah jong kapoh-u ahin, kei dingle nasohnu, chule nasohpa gollhangpa ding jong changlhah le lengpi twi jong kaneiyu ahinai; imacha alhasam aum poi,” ati.
Hichun upapun jong, “Lung mongin ken nangaichat jouse jong ngaito nange; kholai dunga vang gekhovah din ngaito hih beh-in,” ati.
Hijeh chun aman jong Levipa chu ainsunga ahinpuiyin asangan teni jong nehle chah apen amahon jong akeng asil’uvin, an aneuvin twi adontauve.

Hitia hi lung nomtah a aumpet’u chun vetan, khosung mi, pannabei michavai ho chun ain chu ahin umkim’uvin, akotpi ahinvo pan tauve; chujongle amaho hin ainneipa upapu jah a chun aseiyun, hitin atiuve, “Nahenga hung na-ina hung lhungpa chu hinkaidoh-in, numei bola kabol diu ahi,” tin angehtauve.
Chuphat’in ainneipa chu apotdoh-in ahenguva agaseitai; “Ahipoi sopite hitobanga melsen chon hih heluvin; hichepa ka inchal noiya ahung valut namu man’uvin hitobang thilse hi bol din go hih-uvin.

Ven kei chanu nu-ngah theng tah khat le hichepa thaikemnu aum lhon nai, ama ni hi nahin puidoh peh maiyunge. Amani nadei deiyun bol jengun lang apha nasah lam lamin kibol tauvin; hichepa douna a vang hitobang thilse hi nabol louhel diu ahi,” ati.

Ahinla michavai ho chun athusei jong angaipeh tapouvin, hijeh chun upapun jong athaikemnu chu amanin ahenguva asedoh peh jenga ahileh, amahon amanu chu akitimatpi soh keiyuvin, jan khovah kei jingkah geiyin kichepnan aneitauve; jing kho ahungvah thil thel phat’in amanu chu alha kang bep’uvin ahi.
Jingkah kho ahungvah lhah phat’in anumeinu jong ahungin ajipa lhunna upapu kotpi phungbula chun akisep lhun niso geiyin akijam dentai.
Ajipa chu jingkah-in ahung thoudoh- in in kotpi ho chu ahong lhan, amasang lama achedoh a agapotdoh leh vetan, numei athaikemnu chu in kotpi phungbula chun anakijamin akhut teni hongcha a anakiphai.
Hichun ajipan jong ajah a, “Thoudoh-in chetau hite,” ativangin adonbut ta hih hel’e. Hichun aman jong numeinu chu sangan chunga adomdoh-in amipa jong akipatdoh pai paiyin ainlama achemangtai.

Levi pa chu ain ahung lhun phat’in chemcha khat asatdoh-in, athaikemnu long chu atuh-in abat bat’in a-attel’in batsom le batnin ahomkhenin, hiti chun Israel gamsung jousea amanu tahsa chu athotsoh keitan ahi.

Chutah chun amupha chanin, “Egypt gama kona Israelte ahung potdoh a pat tuni geiyin hitobang thilsoh jong asokha hihlaiyin mujong akimu kha hih laiye, hichepi hi gel temuvin lang, nalung ngaitouvin, seiloi temun,” akitiuve.
Chutah chun Israel chate jouse Dan apat Beersheba chan gei, Gilead gamsung geiyin ahung kondoh soh keiyun Mizpah khoa khoppi pumpi chu mihem khatseh bangin Pakai koma akitit tauve.
Israel phung jousea mipi lamkai jouse ama cham chamin Pathen mi Houbunga chun ahung lhasoh keiyun, akenga lam jot theiya chemjam lamthei cheh pasal sang ja li alhinguvin ahi.
Hichun Israel chate Mizpah khoa akitol toutauve, tijong Benjamin chaten ajatauvin ahi. Chuin Israel chaten jong, “I-atileh hitobanga melse thil hi soh a hitam, neiseipeh loiyun?” tin adongtauve.
Numeinu athanu jipa Levi mipa chun adonbut’in aseitai,“Keima Gib’e-ah kiti Benjamin kho khat’a ka hung lhungpan keile kathaikemnu akhoa chu jan ge ding kago lhonin ahi.
Hichun Gib’eah kho miten eihin delkhum uvin, jan laiyin kalhuna in chu ahin um kimsoh jenguve; keima thadin eigouvin, kathaikemnu anop agot’a aboluva ahileh athilo tai.

Hijeh a chu keiman kathaikemnu long chu ka-attel tela, Israel goulo chenpha gamsungse sea kahin thotsoh kei ahi; ijeh-inem itile amahon Israel’ lah a thet umtah thil aboluva, ngol’ hoitah khat atohdoh-u ahi.
Ven nangho Israel chate nabonchan, nang le nang kihouvun lang, ipi lungthim kena pha ham, hiche thua hi?” ati.

Chutah chun mipi abonchauvin mihem khat seh bangin din khat’in adingdoh soh keiyun hitin aseiyuve, “Eiho khat’ a khat jeng cha jong aponbuh kijot ium thei lou diu, ilah-uva koima cha jong ain lama iki le kit theilou diu ahi.
Tua eihon hitia hi Gib’eah kho igabol diu ahi. Vang isanuva iga notou diu ahi;

chule Israel phung tina konin mihem jakhat lah a som khat, sang khat lah a ja khat, sang som lah a sang khat mipi anneh ding, nehpon pansah-u hitin, amaho chu ahung tenguleh Benjamin kho Gib’eah chun Israel sunga ngolhoi tah chonset hitobang melse aboldoh nau chu alethuh thei diu ahi,” atiuve.
Hitobang tah hin Isreal mite chu abonchan Gib’eah khopi dounan akipum khat theiyun, pasal khatseh bangin apangtauve.
Hichun Israel phung kikhom ho chun Benjamin phunglah ami asol masauvin, agaseisah-ui, “Nalah-uva thilse hitobanga melse hi iti soa hitam?

Hijeh chun tun Gib’eah khoa michavai loi mi phalou ho chu hinpe doh jengun, keihon amaho chu kathauva, Israelte lah a thilse kasuh beidiu ahi,” atiuve. Ahinla Benjamin miho chun asopiteu Israel chate thusei chu ngaisah-in aneipeh pouvin ahi.
Hisang chun Benjamin chate chu Gib’eah khopi dunga konin ahung kitoldoh-uvin, Israel chate douna galkon din ahung jo tauve.

Hiche nikho hin Benjamin chate mong mong Gib’eah khopia chengho simtha louvin, akhopi jouseuva konin mi ahung kisimdoh uvin ahileh chemjam lamthei cheh pasal sang som ni le sanggup alhinguve, amaho hin pasal pha lhentum cheh ja sagi asimdoh son kit’uvin ahi.
Mipi hijat lah chun pasal pha lhen tum cheh akhut veilong, ja sagi ma aumuvin, amaho chu amitel chan songboma samjang khat jeng jong peikha thei, sep khellou hel cheh ahiuve.
Benjamin simtha louvin Israel mite chu chemjam lamthei cheh sang ja li akisimdoh-uvin, abonchauva chu gal bolthei mi jeng ahisoh keiyui.

Hichun abonchan akipatdoh soh keiyun Bethel lama achetouvun, Pathen agadongun aseitauve, “Benjamin chate to kisat dia keiho lah a koipen hi kon masa pen ding ham?” atiuve. Hichun Pakaiyin, “Judah phung kon masa ding ahi,” tin aseitai.
Ajingkah chun Israel chate jong akipatdoh-uvin, Gib’eah khopi dounan ngahmun asat tauve.
Israel mite chu Benjamin dounan gal akonuvin, hiti hin Israel mite chu Gib’e-ah khoa chun Benjamin miho dounan galmuna akigol tauvin ahi.
Chutah chun Gib’e-ah khopia konin Benjamin chate ahung kitoldohuvin akisat uleh Israelte lah a mi sang som ni le sang ni jen hiche ni chun tola akijam chap tauve.
Ahivangin mipi, Israel mite chu akihan lho tei teiyun, nikho masa nia akigolnau muna mama chun galbol din galmuna akigol kit jengtauve.

Chujongle Israel chate achetouvun nilhah geiyin Pakai henga aga kap uvin ahi; Pakai adong kit’uvin, “Kasopi teu Benjamin chate chu galmuna kidoupi dia kajot kit diu ham?” tia aseiyu leh; Pakaiyin jong “Ganotou kit uvin,” atipeh-e.
Hijeh chun Israel chaten jong ani ni lhinin Benjamin chate chu ahin jon lut kittauve.

Ani ni lhin ni jong chun Gib’e-ah khopia konin Benjamin chate chu amaho to kisat din akondoh kit’uvin akisat’uva ahileh, Israel chate lah a mi sang som le sang get akijam chap kittauve, abonchauva chu chemjam lamthei cheh ahiuvin ahi.

Hitah chun Israel chate a bon chan sepai jouse chu apumpin akitol touvun Bethel a ahunguvin akaptauve; Bethel a chun Pakai angsunga ataovun, an ngolin hiche ni chun nilhah geiyin aumun Pakai angsunga pumgo thil le chamna thilto atoh tohjengun ahi.
Israel chaten Pakai adong donguvin ahi; ijehinem itileh hiche laiya chu Pathen kitepna thingkong hikoma hi kikoi nalai ahiye;

hiche laiya thingkong phunga kinbola phangji chu Aaron chapa Eleazar chapa Phin’ehas kitipa ahin, hitin adonguvin ahi, “Kasopiteu Benjamin chate toh kisat dinga gal kakon kit diu ham, ahilouleh kahai diu hitam?” atiuve. Hichun Pakaiyin aseiyin, “Kontou tauvin, ajeh chu jing teng amaho khu nakhut uva kapehdoh ding ahitai,” ati.
Hiche phat chun Israelten jong Gib’e-ah khovel dunga chun mi achang pansah tauve.
Chujouvin nithum alhin phat’in Israel chate chu Benjamin chate sat din akontouvun, amasa dunga bang bangin Gib’e-ah khopi doudin akigol kit tauve.

Benjamin chate jong Israel mipi chutoh kidinte din akitoldoh kit’uvin khopi chu adalhasoh tauvin ahi; chujongle adanga bang chun Israel chate mi phabep asat lih pan’uvin athat pan tauve, lhanglam dunga Bethel lampi le Gib’e-ah lampi dunga chule tollhang dunga hiti chun abol’uvin, Israel mite somthum bang athat tauvin ahi.

Hichun Benjamin chaten aseiyun, “Amasa tobanga akehgam kit hitauva hi,” atiuve. Chujongle Israel chaten aseiyun, “Eiho jamu hitin, amaho hi akhopiuva konin lhanglam dung tina puimangu hite,” atiu ahibouve.

Chutah chun Israel mite abonchan aum umna cheh a ahung ding dohsoh keiyun, Ba’at-tamar kiti laiya chun galsat din ahung kigoldoh tauve; chuin Geba nilhum lama anachang pang Israel mite jong chu abonchan am a ama pan mun cheh a konin ahung dingdoh soh keitauvin ahi.

Hichea bin Gib’e-ah khopi sat din Israel pumpi lah a pasal lhentum cheh sangsom ahung kondoh uvin, hasat sat’in akisat tauve. Banajamin chate hin, aman thahna diu abailam tai, ti anakihetdoh loulaiyu ahi.

Hiti hin Pakaiyin Israel masanga Benjamin chate chu gal alelsah tai, hiche nikho chun Israel chaten Benjamin phunga mihem sang som ni le sang nga toh ja khat a that gamuvin ahi; mihem hijat chu chemjam lamthei cheh ahiuve.
Benjamin chaten gal aleltauve, ti akimudoh tauvin ahi. Israel miten Gib’e-ah kho sat dia achangpan sah-u miho chu ason jeh-uvin, Benjamin phung mite dingin mun a-ot tauve,
Hichun achangpang ho chu kinle bongin ahung loiyun Gib’e-ah khopi ahindel vuh jenguve; hi to bang hin chang pang ho chu ahung kitoldoh-uvin khopi chu chemjam hemin asat gam hel’uvin ahi.
Israel mite leh achang pang ho kah a aki hounau melchihna chu chang panghon khopi sunga kona meikhu ahin kitundoh sah tenguleh

Israel miten jong gala ahin delkhum diuva kihoutoh sa ahiuve. Benjamin chaten Israel chate chu mi somthum athapan kit’u ahitan, hijeh chun amaho akihouvun, “Gal masa a bang banga imasanguva satchap a umkit hitauva hi,” atiuvin ahi.
Ahinla akihounau melchihna meikhu khopi sunga kona alomchanga ahung kitundoh phat chun, Benjamin chate akinung heiyun ahileh vetan, khopi chu alhol’in aka jengin vanlaiya meikhu akitungdoh tai.
Chuphat’in Isreal miten ahinle delun ahileh Benajamin miho chu alung thoi gamtauve; ijeh-inem itileh achunguva manthahna hung lhung ahitai, ti amudoh tauve.

Hijeh chun Israel chate masanga akinung heiyun, gamthip lam jon in ajam tauve; ahivangin agal kisat chun alap den kit’uvin khopi sunga kona hindel pai pai hon alailunguva ahung valut phat’uvin khat khat’in asatchap kit tauvin ahi.
Benjamin mite chu asatgam jenguvin anungu adelpeh-un, akengton achilmat jengun, Nohah a pat’in niso lam Gib’e-ah khopi gal lam geiyin agadel peh-uvin ahi.
Benjamin miho lah a mihem sang som le sang get akijam chap heluvin, aboncha gal hat jeng ahiuve.

Hitobang hin Benjamin miho chu akileheiyun, gammang langa Rimmon songpi phunglam adel’uvin a jam tauve; lampi dunga mihem sang nga jen Israelten asat lih pauvin, chuin Gidom geiyin hadel delin agadel’uvin alah-uva mihem sang ni jen agatha be kit’uve.
Hitobang hin chuche nikhoa thi mong mong mihem chemjam lamthei cheh chu sang som ni le sang nga alhingin aboncha galhat mijeng ahiuve.
Ahin Benjamin miho ja gup akihei manguvin gammang langa Rimmon songpi phung jonin ajam’uvin, Rimmon songpi phunga chun lha li sungin aga cheng den tauve.

Hitobang tah chun Israel mite jong akile heiyun Benajmin chate asat’uvin, mihem jong gancha jong amaiphah phah-u chemjam hemto atouvin, asatchap jeng junguve. Kholen dung atokhah jouseu jong chu meiyin ahal hal jengun ahi.
Israel mite chun Mizpah khoa kihahsel abolun hitin aseiyui, “Eiho koima chan jong achanu Benjamin miho toh kicheng dia eipeh theilou hel diu ahi,” atiuve.
Chuin mipi chu Bethel a ahungun, hikoma chun nilhah geiyin Pathen angsunga ataovun, O thong je jun akapatuve.
Hichea hin amahon aseitauve, “O Pakai Israel Pathen, ibola hitobang thilpi hi Israel lah a soh doh a tupet tah a Israelte sunga phung khat lhasama um ding hitam?” atiuve.
Ajing jingkah chun mipi jingpi tah-in athouvun hikoma chun maicham khat asem uvin pumgo tamtah le chamna thilto tamtah atohdoh tauve.

Chujongle Israel chaten aseiyun, “Israel phung chujat lah a chu koipen phung hi Houbung kikhopna hung pang lou um am?” tin akihol tauve. Ijeh-inem itile Mizpah kiti laiya Pakai henga hung kaltou loupa chunga chu kihahselna giltah aneiyuva hitia aseiyu ahi, “Ahung pangloupa chu tha jeng ding ahi,” atiu ahiye.
Hiche hin Israel chate asopipau Banjamin din avoujangu anan, hijeh chun aseitauve,” Israel lah a konin tunin phung khat akisubei tai.
Pasal ahingdoh ho dinga aji diu ipi ingaito peh diu hitam, eiho hila Pakai henga kihahsela inchanu u khat’a khat cha jong peh lou ding itiu ahitan,” akitiuve.

Hichun amaho akidong touvin, “Israel phung sunga phung khat hikom Mizpah khoa hung kaltou lou aumuve?” akitiuve. Ajeh chu vetan, Ja’besh-gilead phunga kon chun ngahmun a Houbung kikhopna a koima ahung lhapoi.
Chujongle mipi galsat dinga akisimtoh pet’u jong chun, vetan, Ja’besh-gilead khoa cheng mite lah a konin koima cha anapang pouve.

Hijeh chun Khoppi kikhom ho chun Ja’besh-gilead langa chun mi gal-hang cheh sang som le sang ni asoluvin, ama ho chu thu apeuvin, hitin aseiyui, “Cheuvin lang Ja’besh gilead a chengte chu chemjam hemin gasat gam heluvin; numei le nunao chapang geiyin hinthat tauvin.
Chujongle nanghon hitia nabol diu ahi, pasal jouse le numei pasal toh lumkhomsa jouse hin thatsoh hel’uvin,” atiuvin ahi.

Chuin ache ho chun Ja’besh-gilead khoa chengte lah a chun nu-ngah khangdong jong pasal toh lumkhoma kitimat louhel lai ja li jen amudoh-uvin, amaho chu Canaan gamsunga Shiloh ngahmun a chun ahinpuilut tauve.
Hichun khoppi pumpi Rimmon songkoa kisel Benjamin chate henga thu athot’uvin, ahenguva chamna thu agaseitauve.
Hijeh chun Benjamin te chu ahung kit’uvin, Israel ten jong Ja’besh gilead khoa numei ahing hoiyu gal hinga ahinkai chengseu chu Benjamin te chu apetauve; ahivangin numeiho chu achangsoh tapouvin ahi.
Pakaiyin Benjamin chu Israel phung lah a akeh lhah ahitah jeh chun, Israel mipin jong avoujang nat pi lheh jenguve.
Hichun khoppi loi upa hon jong aseiyuvin, “Benjamin phung sunga numei jouse la akisu mang ahitan, tua ahing nalai pasal ho dia hi aji dia hoilam iholpeh diu hi tam?” atiuve.
Chuin amah on aseiyuvin, “Israel phunga kona Benjamin abeihel louna dia ahingdoh cheng dia hi goulo ding khat ngaito tei tei ding ahi.
Ahinla eiho ichanu hou hi aji diuva ipeh theilou diu ahi,” atiuve. Ajeh chu Israel chate ana kihahsel uva, “Benjamin phung dia numei aji ding pepen pen chu gaosap cheng hen,” anatiu ahi.

Hijeh chun amahon aseiyun, “Ven Shiloh khoa khun kumseh le Pakai henga kut kibol ji ahi; Shiloh hi Bethel kho sah lam ahin, Bethel a pat a Shechem lam jotna lhanglampi niso lam ahin, Lebo’nah lhanglam ahi,” atiuve.
Hichun amahon Benjamin chate chu thu apeuvin hi tin aseiyui; “Cheuvin lang lengpi leiya khun ga kisel’uvin;

chule ga-ngah lhiuvin; Shiloh chanute chu alam dinga lamna mun dunga ahungdoh tenguleh, pasal jousen ama ama ji ding cheh khat cheh hin kimat jenguvin, Shiloh chanute lah a kon chun, chutengle Benjamin gamsung laiya jamlutpi tauvin.

Chule apateu le asopiteu keiho henga ahunguva kiphinna thu ahung seitengu leh keihon amaho jah a seipeh uving ting, ‘Amaho khu keiho din hepi tah-in phalpeh jenguvin. ajeh chu keihon apasal jouseu dia khu galmuna kona ajidiu numei alhinga kahinpuipeh joulouvu ahin, nanghon jong aji diu napeh deh louvu ahi, napeh louvuva ahileh tua nathep mo lo diu ahi’, tin donbut tauvinge,” atiuve.

Hijeh chun Benjamin chaten jong abol’uvin, achancheh in nungah alam ho lah a kon chun aji diu akipuitauve; chujongle amaho goulo gam sung lama akile kit’uvin, kholen len chu akisah phat kit’uvin chennan aneitauve.
Hiche pet chun Israel chate jong hikoma kon chun akitoldoh soh keiyun, ama ama insung le aphung mite lah akijot tauve; hiti hin hikoma kona hi amitakip in ama ama gam goulo sung cheh aki jot ahitai.
Hiche lai chun Israelte lah a leng ana um hih laiye; hijeh chun amitakip chun ama ama mitvet’a adih asah cheh chu abol tan ahi.
